data.title: Google debuts Gemini app for Mac users, offering keyboard access, screen sharing, and AI tools for free.
data.description: Google has launched the Gemini desktop application for macOS users. The app offers instant keyboard access, screen sharing features, and integrated AI tools. Users can enjoy these functionalities at zero cost.

data.title: Bitcoin BTC hits $74K amid profit-taking surge; 43% short-term holders in profit. Rally lacks conviction as institutions stay cautious.
data.description: According to on-chain data, Bitcoin is currently at a value of $74,000, and approximately 43% of short-term holders are currently making a profit. Glassnode has cautioned that the current rally may be lacking conviction due to cautious behavior among institutions.

data.title: Altius Provides 1st Quarter 2026 Project Generation Update
data.description: Altius Minerals Corporation (ALS:TSX) provided an update on its Project Generation (“PG”) business activities and junior equities portfolio, revealing a market value of approximately $70.0 million for the equities in the portfolio as of March 31, 2026. This marks a significant increase from the $49.3 million reported at the end of December 31, 2025. A net portfolio investment of around $0.6 million was made during the quarter. Additionally, Altius engaged in equity financing activities during the same period.

data.title: Snapchat owner cuts 16% full-time staff for A.I. shift, laying off around 1,000 employees to boost tech use.
data.description: The corporation behind the popular social media platform Snapchat has announced a significant reduction in its workforce, with approximately 1,000 employees being laid off. This decision comes as the company looks to bolster its integration of artificial intelligence technology.
Xtract One completes filing of final base shelf prospectus.

data.title: Johnson & Johnson Posts Solid Q1 To Kickstart 'Year Of Accelerating Growth,' Says Bullish Analyst
data.description: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) exceeded expectations in its first-quarter report, with a notable increase in sales from its Innovative Medicine division. Despite positive results, JNJ stock is currently on a downward trend. Analysts at Guggenheim Securities believe that the latest results indicate potential for significant growth in revenue and earnings throughout the year and beyond. Analyst Vamil Divan, who has a Buy rating on the stock, highlighted that the company achieved total sales of $24.06 billion and earnings of $2.70 per share, surpassing consensus estimates of $23.61 billion and $2.68 per share, respectively. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: eToro buys Zengo for $70M, paving the way for self-custody crypto solutions as demand rises for non-custodial infrastructure.
data.description: The agreement indicates eToro's strategic expansion into self-custody services in response to increasing demand for non-custodial crypto infrastructure.

data.title: Countries increasing emergency spending amid high energy costs, causing debt concerns. Policymakers urge caution in public funding.
data.description: As energy costs continue to escalate, policymakers are emphasizing the need for caution as governments allocate funds to support households and businesses during this challenging time. The increasing energy costs are expected to impact numerous sectors, prompting officials to advocate for measures to mitigate these effects on the economy.

data.title: Fincantieri Secures First U.S. Navy Contract for LSM Program
data.description: In Trieste, Italy, Fincantieri has been awarded a $30 million contract by the U.S. Navy for materials procurement and engineering activities for the construction of four Medium Landing Ships. This comes after the Navy's announcement on February 18, 2026, regarding the Request for Proposal (RFP) for the Medium Landing Ship program, which covers a total of up to 35 vessels. Fincantieri Marine Group (FMG) will be responsible for building four of these vessels as part of the program.
